description: The Selection fragrance for men from hugo boss is for the debonair urban male. boss Selection's first impression is that of lively and fresh green notes. The top notes are juicy grapefruit and mandarin, along with spicy pink peppercorn nuance. In the heart of the fragrance is the aroma of geranium and cedar leaves, surrounded by star anise and petitgrain.Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
